records.statement: Host-side lifecycle hooks (initializeCommand and other workspace-resident host hooks) are gated behind an explicit workspace-trust opt-in before any host execution.
records.notes: Deacon-specific security gate the upstream spec does not mandate (--trust-workspace[-persist], a persisted allowlist, DEACON_NO_PROMPT=1 to fail closed). Recorded by ext-workspace-trust-gate; backed by case-trust-gate. See SECURITY.md and crates/core/src/trust.rs.
